data.acceptance:
1) In the OpenCode model pulldown, each visible option shows only the last segment of the model identifier after splitting by '/'.
2) The hardcoded 'OpenCode' (or equivalent) prefix is not shown in option labels.
3) The dropdown no longer truncates the displayed model name for existing entries; full last-token names are visible.
4) The selected model value and behavior used by the app remain unchanged (only the UI label rendering is affected).
